zh.lifeSummary: Elbert II de Bethune是Siger de Bethune和Berthe de Lenoncourt的兒子，於1145年出生。他和Adeline N至少有1個兒子。他去世於1210年享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elbert II de Bethune是Siger de Bethune和Berthe de Lenoncourt的儿子，于1145年出生。他和Adeline N至少有1个儿子。他去世于1210年享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bethune
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin); French (Béthune): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, Picardy, France, recorded in the 8th century in the Latin form Bitunia, probably an adjective (with villa understood) derived from the oblique form of an ancient Germanic personal name Betto, an assimilated form of Berto (see Bert ). See also Scottish Beaton .

variants.name: Beaton
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, France (see Bethune ). The Hebridean family of McBeth , hereditary physicians, adopted the surname Beaton in the 16th century.
English: from the Middle English personal name Beton, a diminutive of Bete, a pet form of Beatrice (see Beatrice ). Compare Beat .

variants.name: Bert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philibert, Pierre.
German, French, and Polish: from a short form of various compound personal names formed with ancient Germanic berht ‘bright, famous’ (see for example Bertram ).
English: from the Middle English female personal name Berte (Old French Berte, from ancient Germanic Berta ).

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: Elbert II de Bethune was born in 1145 as the son of Siger de Bethune and Berthe de Lenoncourt. He had at least 1 son with Adeline N. He died in 1210, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Elbert II de Bethune est né en 1145, fils de Siger de Bethune et Berthe de Lenoncourt. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Adeline N. Il est décédé en 1210, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Elbert II de Bethune wurde 1145, als Sohn von Siger de Bethune und Berthe de Lenoncourt geboren. Er hatte mit Adeline N mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1210 im Alter von 65 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Elbert II de Bethune è nato il nel 1145 come figlio di Siger de Bethune e Berthe de Lenoncourt. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Adeline N. Morì nel 1210, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elbert II de Bethuneは1145年にSiger de BethuneとBerthe de Lenoncourtの息子として生まれた。彼はAdeline Nとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1210年に65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elbert II de Bethune(은)는 1145년 Siger de Bethune(와)과 Berthe de Lenoncourt의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Adeline N(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1210년 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elbert II de Bethune nasceu em 1145 filho de Siger de Bethune e Berthe de Lenoncourt. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Adeline N. Ele faleceu em 1210, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Elbert II de Bethune родился в 1145 г. Его родителей звали Siger de Bethune и Berthe de Lenoncourt. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Adeline N. Он умер в 1210 г. в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Elbert II de Bethune nació en 1145 como hijo de Siger de Bethune y Berthe de Lenoncourt. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Adeline N. Murió en 1210, a la edad de 65 años.
